title: doryopteris pedatoides
intro: Doryopteris pedatoides, also known as the fan fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Blechnaceae, native to tropical Africa. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Doryopteris pedatoides include the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a wound healer. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
